titleStmt.title: SII 5.489: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 489. (A.R. No. 190 of 1894). ON THE SOUTH, EAST AND NORTH WALLS OF THE BILVANATHESVARA TEMPLE AT TIRUVALLAM.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumātu puvieṉum perumātar Ivar tan(ṉ) māteviyarāka mitoḷir veṇkuṭai Uyarttiṇ kalikaṭintu(t) taṉ ciṟutātaiyākiya Ēṟivalik kaṅkaikoṇṭacoḻaṉaip poṅkikal Irumuṭicoḻa neṉṟum porumuraṭ ṭaṉ ṟiruttampiyartamuḷ veṉṟikoḷ mummuṭicoḻaṉai temmuṉai yaṭutiṟaṟ coḻapāṇṭiya ṉeṉṟum koḻimaṉ ṟoṭukaḻal viracoḻaṉait tolpukaḻk karikālacoḻa ṉeṉṟum porutiṟal vāḷvalit taṭakkai maturān=ta kaṉaic coḻakaṅka ṉeṉṟun toḷvali mevutaṟp parāntakatevaṉait toḷvali yayottiyarāja ṉeṉṟun tayaratRead tuyarat.taṉpoṭu karutu kātalaruḷit talampuka ḻirājentiracoḻaṉai Uttamacoḻa ṉeṉṟun tottaṇi mukaiyavi ḻalaṅkal muṭikoṇṭacoḻaṉai yikal vijai yālaya ṉeṉṟum pukarmukat teḻuyarkaḷuṟṟuc coḻakeraḷaṉai vārcilaic coḻakeraḷa ṉeṉṟun tiṇaṭiṟalk kaṭāraṅkoṇṭacoḻaṉait tiṉakaraṉ kulattuc ciṟappamar coḻacaṉakarāja ṉeṉṟuṅ kaṉaikaḻalp paṭikoṇṭa pulapukaḻ muṭikoṇṭacoḻaṉaic cuntaracoḻa ṉeṉṟuñ centamiḻ piṭiya liraṭṭapāṭi koṇṭacoḻaṉai tolpuviyāḷuṭai coḻakaṉṉakucciyarāja ṉeṉṟum piṉṉun taṉ kātalarkātalar tammuḷ metakukatirāṅ kaṉaikaḻal maturāntakaṉait tolpaṭaic coḻavallapa ṉeṉṟu māṉaccilaikkai yorāṉaic cevakaṉai
ṉirupentiracoḻa neṉṟum parumaṇiccuṭar neṭumakuṭañ cūṭṭip paṭimicai nikaḻu ṉāḷiṉu(ḷiṉu)ḷ kalveṭṭeḻuntu Oṇṭiṟa liruṭṭamaṇṭalameytiy natikaḷuṉāṭum patikaḷu maṉekamu maḻittaṉaṉ vaḷavaṉṉeṉ ṟammoḻi keṭṭu vekaveñcaḷukki yākavamallaṉ paripava miṉakkiteṉ ṟeriviḻit teḻuntu cepparuṅkittik koḷappat takavaiyi nuṭaṉ ṟamar tuṭaṅkiyapoḻu tavaṉ ceñcaramāri taṉ kuñcarak kuvaṭṭilun taṉ ṟiruttuṭaiyiluṅ kuṉṟukoḷ puyattinu maitakkavum tanṉuṭan kaḷuṟeṟiya toṭukaḻalvirar maṭiyavum vakaiyā torutani yaṉekam porupaṭai vaḻaṅki moñRead moym[pa]mar.pamar caḷukki tampi cayaciṅkanum porp pulakkeciyum tārttacapaṉmanumenu māṉa maṉṉaru maṇṭalicokayaṉu mānavaṇpuka ḻāḷu maraiyanumanteṉamar maṭṭavi ḻalaṅkal moṭṭaiyanuṅ kiṭṭiyal naṉinuḷampanum Eṉṟeṇṇili yaraicarai viṇṇakatteṟṟi vaṉṉiyarevanum vayappaṭaikkai taṇṭamayyanum Eṉṟinna varaicaro ṭañci yaccaḷukki kulakula kulain=tu talaimayir virittu muṉnuṟa neḷittup piṉnuṟa ṉokkik kālpaṟittoṭi (toṭi) melkaṭal pāyat tuṟattiyapoḻu taccerukkaḷattaviṭu catturupuyaṅkaraṉ karapattiraṉ mulapattara cātipakaṭṭaṉ manekammeṭṭu naṭaip parikaḷu moṭṭaka niraikaḷum varāka velkoṭimuta lirācap pariccinnamum Oppil cattiyavvai cāṅkappai yeṉṟivar mutaṟ ṟeviyar kuḻā
mum pāvaiya riṭṭamu menaiyana piṟavu munaivaiyiṟ koṇṭu vijaiyaabhiṣe- kañceytu tenṟicaivayiṟ poruppaṭai naṭāttik kārkkaṭa lilaṅkaiyil viṭāṟpaṭai kaliṅkaṉ viracalāmekanaik kaṭākkaḷuṟṟoṭum paṭak katirmuṭi taṭintu koṇṭaruḷi Ilaṅkaik kiṟaivan mānāparaṇan kātala riruvaraik kaḷattiṭaip piṭittu māpperumpukaḻ mika vaḷartta kopparakecarivanma rāna Uṭaiyār [śrī]rājentirade varkku yāṇṭu 4 Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattup perumpāṇappāṭit tūṉā(ā)ṭṭuk kukkaṉūrkāṇiuṭaiya śivabrāhma ṇaromum tiruvallamuṭaiyār tevakanmi kaḷomum nilavilaiyāvaṇak kaiyyeḻuttu Ittevar de vatānaṅ kukkanūr Ellaiyetta makappaṭak kār pacāṉa nilattukkum kiḻpāṟkellai nūkāvāṟṟukku mekkum tenpāṟkellai kurāvan peḻaikkum Ivvūrkkiḻeri nirkoppukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Ivvūr pālārkiḻkaraikkum Ilattaikkuṭṭaik kiḻkaraikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai civapātacekaranallū rellaikkut teṟkum Ivvūr Ellaiettam Uṭpaṭṭa mātavan kammuṅkāluṅ karaiyum Āka Iṉṉāṟpāṟ kellaiyuḷḷum naṭuvupaṭṭa nila mukutik kuṟai vuḷḷaṭaṅka mutaṟ tarattu kuḻi munṟum Atikārikaḷ Ālattūruṭaiyān tivākaran
nampiyārāna vānavan muventaveḷārkku viṟṟukkuṭutta paricāvatu Iṉnilam 6- mā veṭṭiyuṉ tiruttiyum pūṭṭai Iṭṭum Erikaṭṭiyum tām veṇṭu payirceytuñ ceyvittukkoṇṭum munpu kāṇikkaṭanā yuḷḷa nibandha n tavirat tām veṇṭum nibandha m tiruvallamuṭaiyār koyililey ceytukoḷḷappeṟuvārāka viṟṟu vilaiśrā vaṇai ceytukuṭuttom Ivviṟṟu Emmilicainta krayadravyam � nilañ cuṭṭi veṭṭik kūṟṟunellu Alpamiṟai Uḷḷiṭṭu yātonṟum kāṭṭappeṟātomākavum Ipparicu Icaintu viṟṟukkuṭutto miccollappaṭṭa Ivvanaivom Ivarkaḷ colla Eḻutineṉ Innāṭṭu Aiyampūṇṭi madhyastha n nūṟṟeṇman Uttamakaṅkatevaneṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi viṟṟukkuṭutten kaucikaṉ civakkoḻuntu tirukkāḷattipaṭṭaneṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi viṟṟukkuṭutten kaucikan tiruvikkiramaṉ civakkoḻuntupaṭṭaneṉ Ivai En Eḻuttu Ippaṭi viṟṟukkoṭutten kocikar kampan Aṅkāṭipaṭṭaneṉ Ivai En Eḻuttu Ivai
ṇat tiruttatavattuṟai Attiyūrccelvaṉen Ivai En neḻuttu Ippaṭi viṟṟukkuṭutten kaucikaṉ tirumāṟpeṟā tikkālipperumāneṉ Ivai Eṉ neḻuttu Ippaṭi viṟṟukkuṭutten ku�kaṉūr civabrā maṇan kāśya pan Ātittapaṭṭaneṉ Ivai En neḻuttu Ippaṭi viṟṟukkuṭutten kaucikan vikkiramātittaneṉ Ivai En ṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikkut tirumāṟpeṟaṉ Eḻuttu kāśya pan vikkiramātitta neḻuttu Ippaṭi viṟṟukkuṭutten kauśi kan Aṅkāṭi śi vakkoḻuntupaṭṭaneṉ Ivai En ṉeḻuntu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ tiruvallattu brāhma ṇan kuṇṭūrc caṉṉakkiramavittan Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven Aṅkāṭi caṉneya kra mavittaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟive pūcattirā paṭi Aṟiven centirattu brāhma ṇan pālāciriyan nakkan kolli yen Ivai Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ pālāciriyan lla neḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven vācciyan mallaṉ caṅkaranārāyaṇaneṉ meṟpaṭi kuṇṭur brāhma ṇan melliyaṉ Eḻuttu ...
Digital edition of SII 5.489 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
